content.en:
One Hundred Eternal Kingdoms!!!

Lin Lei and the others were all shocked by the eternal Dao realm.

There are only dozens of eternal kingdoms in the Alliance of the Ten Thousand Gods, but there are a hundred eternal kingdoms here.

Moreover, this is still a hundred new eternal kingdoms, and the resources contained are not comparable to those eternal kingdoms of the Ten Gods Kingdom Alliance.

"Star Lord, why are there so many eternal realms here?" Lin Lei asked curiously.

"It was my father who entered the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, found so many Eternal Realms, and then opened up a hundred Eternal Realms here. In the future, the strong men of the Terrans will move in one after another, and only the Terrans will be allowed to reproduce and develop here. Ye Xingchen said.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen took it to the Endless Yin and Yang River again.

"This is the Endless Yin and Yang River, the eternal "Zero Five-Seven" to the Dao Realm can also come here to find opportunities, there is also the Eternal Yin Wind Belt over there, and there are also some chance treasures in it, but the Eternal Yin Wind Belt is more dangerous, if the Eternal Dao Body is not perfect, it is not recommended to explore the Eternal Yin Wind Belt. "

Ye Xingchen said again.

Afterwards.

These Eternal Dao Realms were sent into those Eternal Realms one by one, and those human beings were released and dispersed.

And there are many tasks in these Eternal Dao Realms, such as building giant cities and human living areas, mining the resources of the Eternal Realm, and so on.

Therefore, during this period of time, these Eternal Dao realms are very busy.

Other than that.

Ye Xingchen also transferred batches of Eternal Dao Realm and Eternal Dao Realm, but not all of them were transferred, and a group of human beings had to stay in the Endless Realm and the Star Realm.

On the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, there is no strong person who can threaten him.

The key is that once they know about the situation on the side of the Endless Kingdom Alliance, there will definitely be a large number of Eternal Dao Realms running to this side, if they don't care, there will be no difference between the Endless Kingdom Alliance and the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, and a large number of forces will be transferred.

In that case, there would be no point for Ye Tian to open up the Endless Realm Alliance.

Of course, he can also stop it, but those forces will definitely leak the news, and the Endless Realm Alliance will not want to develop silently.

So, the best thing to do is to hide it.

When the Terran has developed to a certain extent, he is not afraid of these forces, and he doesn't need to worry about it, and the Terran powerhouses under his command can solve the trouble for him.

......

Before you know it, 100 million years have passed.

this day.

The hundred eternal realms of the Endless Realms Alliance are open, the mask of light is gone, and humans can travel freely between the kingdoms.

And.

These human beings are now skyrocketing in strength, and with the help of the resources within the Endless Realm Alliance, their strength has been greatly improved, coupled with the fact that the Terran Temple established by Ye Tian has openly given many inheritances.

Therefore, under the condition that they do not lack resources and inheritance, their strength is naturally advancing by leaps and bounds!

Now, the human race has given birth to many eternal Dao realms, not to mention the eternal Dao realm, it is everywhere.

Terran Temple.

this day.

Ye Tian came here and put a batch of Eternal Decrees here, allowing the Terrans to practice the Eternal Dao Seed Eternal Dao Realm Exchange, and the price was not high, but after exchanging the Eternal Decrees, the Eternal Realm must be opened up on the Endless Realm.

......

Lin Lei walked into the Terran Temple, and suddenly found that the Terran Temple had opened the exchange of the Eternal State Order.

Lin Lei was shocked.

This is an eternal national decree, placed on the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, countless Eternal Dao realms are eager to obtain an eternal national order, and the entire Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance is only one Eternal Nation, and no force can directly take out the Eternal National Decree like the human race, and let people exchange it.

"Lord Ye Tian estimates that he has obtained a lot of eternal national decrees, and this will be taken out. "

He took a look at the contribution points needed to exchange the Eternal State Order, and his own contribution points were enough.

So, he exchanged an eternal decree and prepared to open up an eternal kingdom and serve as the lord of an eternal kingdom.

Soon after, Lin Lei opened up an eternal kingdom called the Heavenly Thunder Realm.

When this news came out, it really made many Eternal Dao Realms envious, and they were eager to exchange for the Eternal State Decree.

But if you don't have enough strength and enough contribution points, you still can't open up the eternal realm.

But if you accumulate slowly, you will accumulate enough one day.

Of course, the people who opened up the Eternal Kingdom were not only Lin Lei, but also several Eternal Dao Realms of the Ye family, they were the descendants of Ye Xingchen's heirs, and their cultivation strength was not low, and their contribution value was not bad, so they exchanged them for the Eternal Kingdom.

Gradually, the Eternal Realms of the Endless Realms Alliance increased from a hundred to more than a hundred.

And Ye Tian has been looking for the Eternal State Order in the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, so there is no shortage of Eternal State Orders at all.

As long as there were humans who could redeem the Eternal Decree, he allowed them to do so.

The more human lords there are, the more strong people will be cultivated in this way.

So, this situation is a good thing.

And since the opening of the Endless Realm Alliance, Ye Tian's main focus has been on this side, and the two Eternal Realms on the side of the Myriad Gods Alliance have not paid much attention, leaving only a replica body to stay there.

Ye Xingchen even directly transferred his position as the Lord of the Star Kingdom to an Eternal Dao Realm, and no longer managed the Star Kingdom.

However, there is one more thing, that is, the entrance of the Void Domain is too far away from the Endless Realm Alliance, and if he wants to transfer the entrance, he can't do it with his current strength.

He estimated that only by waiting for himself to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm could he transfer the entrance to the Void Realm.

If he didn't care about the Void Domain, he would have wanted to completely abandon the two Eternal Realms 2.6 of the Alliance of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom.

......

"The Eternal Dao seed has been solidified to two!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His strength has strengthened again now, and according to this efficiency, it is estimated that within 10 billion Dao Epochs, he will be sure to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed to ten percent of the realm.

After his strength improved, Ye Tian rushed to a treasure land on the other side of the Jiudu River, that is, the place where the Dongping Dao Lord was trapped.

He was ready to subdue the Xuanlin Ancient Vine, and he felt that the Xuanlin Ancient Vine was very valuable, far higher than the value of the Evil Vine.

In the past, his strength was lower than that of the Xuanlin Ancient Man, and even if he sent multiple copy bodies, it would be difficult to kill the Xuanlin Ancient Man.

But now, he has the hope of killing or subduing Xuanlin Guman.

So, on this day, his six replica bodies came to this treasure place and entered it.
